textByHash.409c87b7f4e408b80d6d6c2fc45af0417db7ffd2: In the name of Guthix, what rights do you have here?
textByHash.5226eb0e627ceccb0a761d8f8040c48e8f41f591: I am not here to help. I wish you all the best, , but I am charged with a singular purpose, and I will now do my duty...
textByHash.6a6966618638a52635414147cc63d431ebb3b24e: The Stone is always in danger. That is why I stand before you.
textByHash.8de494ea1c524079c1b54f4e75a594f9649fd6ba: I know everything about you. I have seen your past, your present and your future.
textByHash.9f5aca7216ce04216cef13e4e8ce9be136ca07a2: Your duty is noble, , but so is mine: To protect the Stone until a time when, near to death, you are relieved of all duties with the gratitude and blessings of Guthix.
